notes: Convoy Escort phase 3 — the journey. Each leg is now a real cycle on the clock and burns fuel, and the lanes grow more dangerous the closer you get to port. Completed runs build your Escort Guild reputation: rank up from Freelancer to Fleet Commander for steadily better pay and a larger escort fleet (up to 4 escorts). Elite Marauder Leads now wield telegraphed battlefield abilities — 💥 Alpha Strike (a doubled hit), 📣 Rally (the whole wave hits harder) and 📡 Jammer (saps your next salvo) — so read their cards and prioritise.
